Esri.ArcGISstyle: City of Cape Town - ISO 19139 Metadata Editor

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

mdContact.rpOrgName: Strategic Development Information and GIS - Corporate GIS

distorCont.rpOrgName: Strategic Development Information and GIS - Corporate GIS

distorFormat.formatName: ESRI data format, dependent upon request

dataIdInfo.idAbs: The Subcouncils within the City of Cape Townas at 2011. As last amended by City of Cape Town Subcouncil Further Amendment By-Law 2011.
dataIdInfo.idPurp: The Subcouncils dataset represent the boundaries of the Subcouncils within the City of Cape Town as at 2011. The boundaries serve to inform administrative delineation.
dataIdInfo.idCredit: GIS Spatial Data Management Section, Keller House, Loop Street, Cape Town.

Consts.useLimit: All rights reserved. No part of this data may be reproduced or transmitted in any form or by any means, electronic or mechanical, including photocopying, recording or by any information storage or retrieval systems, without permission from the GIS Spatial Data Management Section of the City of Cape Town. Where the data is used as basis for or as an insertion in a map, acknowledgement must be made to the source of such data as well as the copyright of the respective creditors.
